hooks.command: cat "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/settings.local.json" 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"pendingTask"' >/dev/null && echo '[RESUME:PENDING] Found pending task - check settings.local.json and resume' || true

hooks.prompt: [SESSION:INIT] BotFacebook (Laravel 12 + React 19). DEBUG WORKFLOW ENFORCED: PreToolUse hook BLOCKS Edit/Write if workflow incomplete. Use 'node .claude/scripts/update-debug-state.js' to track. Flow: DISCOVERY → DIAGNOSIS → PROCESS.
